name: grimoire
description: A single Codex harness plugin for Grimoire workflow skills, Git and engineering workflows, and session context hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Grimoire workflow skills and session context hooks.
interface.longDescription: Grimoire packages one Codex harness plugin with workflow skills for Grimoire bootstrap, skill authoring, issue reporting, current-work triage, work-item preflight and readiness review, locale-grounded translation, code review response, Git workspace cleanup, and conflict resolution. It also includes the SessionStart hook that resolves user and project Grimoire config into a session cache.
defaultPrompt: Use Grimoire before starting this task.
Load the right workflow skill first.
Use $now-what to inspect this workspace and recommend what to do next.
Use $issue-preflight to audit whether this work item is still valid before implementing.
Use $issue-readiness-review to review this work item for implementation readiness and draft the appropriate tracker update.
Use $magical-translation to translate this into my configured Grimoire locale.
Use $magical-review-response to translate and handle this PR review feedback end to end.
Use $git-workspace-cleanup to prune local worktrees and branches back to main.
Use $git-resolve-conflicts to resolve a branch or PR conflict against its remote base.
